ddls:
CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_phrase" TEXT /* Keyword phrase (e.g., portable orange juicer) */,
  "magnet_iq_score" INTEGER /* Magnet IQ score of the keyword */,
  "search_volume" INTEGER /* Search volume of the keyword */,
  "search_volume_trend" REAL /* Search volume trend of the keyword */,
  "seasonality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the keyword has seasonal sales */,
  "seasonal_sales_estimate" REAL /* Estimated sales for the keyword during peak season */,
  "related_keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related keywords */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "product_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller associated with the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competing product */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the competing product */,
  "competitor_asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the competing product */,
  "competitor_title" TEXT /* Title of the competing product */,
  "competitor_price" REAL /* Price of the competing product */,
  "competitor_seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller associated with the competing product */,
  "competitor_brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the competing product */,
  "competitor_average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the competing product */,
  "competitor_total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of customer reviews for the competing product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the seller (e.g., admin, seller) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the seller */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the seller */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller associated with the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Sales of the product */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the product */,
  "customer_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_performance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., sales, revenue, customer reviews) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amazon_data" (
  "amazon_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Amazon data record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the Amazon data */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of customer reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amazon_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amazon_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
